audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. BlockProcessor.ProcessBlock computes receipts root via ReceiptTrie.CalculateRoot and sets it on the processed block header (L117). BlockValidator.ValidateProcessedBlock compares processed vs suggested block receipts roots and rejects mismatches (BlockValidator.cs L181-185). For standard Ethereum (mainnet), spec.ValidateReceipts is always true, ensuring proper trie root validation without backward-compatibility exceptions.
